samples:
I had to learn my inner strength
Against all those who hate me
Against all who try to destroy


They say: "You'll never change"
And yet they want to break you down
So get up, stand strong and fight
Fight for what is right, I fight against myself!
Fight against the force that wants to destroy you!

Against all these people
Who try to put me in a cage
Indisposed with what they said
Destroyed my faith in human beings


Get up, stand tall and fight
Fight for what is right, I fight against myself
Fight against the force that wants to destroy me!

Face to face with this monster
The fear becomes so real
It's time to prove that I am not scared
Don't bow your head, or you will lose respect

Get up, stand tall and fight
Fight for what is right, I fight against myself
Fight against the force that wants to destroy me!

"We are the first to go
Our race is dying out in flame
Don't you remember, "Mother Earth"
I will be lost when she wakes up from her dream
Wake up now!"


And I grow sick of all this destruction
So let me dig a hole and bury my head beneath the ground
All hope destroyed, our home destroyed


Dig until your fingers bleed
Righteous anger rising inside


Open the door and come on in
Take a seat by my side
Please feel at home here now, you belong with us
Feel the warmth of her presence so pure and bright


Leave the past behind you now
Welcome future generations
New land was born
This sacred forest grows tall
Carved in stone for eternity
Unspeakable beauty resides within



Open your eyes, please understand
You are what we all need to protect


On behalf of all that live in forest
We fight to overcome all forces
That destroy our nature
We must save ourselves

Lost in a maze, I struggle to get free
Enter the realm of the fallen
Indisposed by what you've become, I fight for control


Fight until there is no one left standing against me


Wake up! Wake up! I must survive at all costs
This war has always been mine alone
I was born into this torture as long ago
As the Earth existed


Wake up! Wake up! No time to sleep
All hell break loose when I awake from slumber
Don't let yourself fade away or even try
Your life's meaninglessness will crush your soul

The future is bleak; destroy it before you go
Destroy yourself ! Destroy yourself !
In order to save myself...destroy him ! Destroy him !



Leave behind you the ruins of yesterday's dream
And build new one tomorrow (tomorrow)
Carved stone structures, magnificent towers high on my land
Tomorrow, tomorrow ...

Leave behind you the ruins of yesterday's dream
And build new one tomorrow (tomorrow)
Carved stone structures, magnificent towers high on my land
Tomorrow, tomorrow ...

Out of sight and out of reach You hide from the truth We are running round in circles Around you, round you Get away from me, get away from me Get away from me, get away from me now! I've had enough of being your slave No way to survive in this cage There's no escape for me but one day I will learn Wake up and fight back straight into the light Break the chains that bind me down Leave me alone ! Leave me alone ! Leave me alone ! Leave me alone ! It’s not so bad if we’re all falling Life is short, don’t let it go Put an end to your suffering Let a lion roar in you awake ! Now ROAR !! Get away from me ! Get away from me ! Get away from me ! Get away from me ! Don’t tell me how to live my life Leave me alone, just leave me alone

It's not about being strong, but it's also not about holding on
Don't you think? Don't you think? And I just cannot reveal my secrets yet


All the stars and planets are aligned to give birth
Of something new, a star of hope
And we should celebrate that life force is alive inside us
We feel so high as this river flows, yeah, yeah

If only words could express how we feel for what we created
You know exactly what I mean... If only words could express
This feeling of rebirth, resurrection, realization
We would sing together in this sacred space

Enter and embrace your inner child, become one with the cosmos
Give thanks again! Give thanks again! And bow down to this force
Acceptance comes when our whole lives have been revealed to us
The living cells renew themselves, reborn to higher state

Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah


All the stars and planets are aligned to give birth
Of something new, a star of hope
And we should celebrate that life force is alive inside us
We feel so high as this river flows

I cannot even see
Cannot even feel
Get out my way and leave me alone
Destroyed inside, destroy my pride
You tore my arms away from my chest


Wake up to the fact that I've been so low
Woke up to reality facing the cold
Open your eyes, learn how you better understand
This thing called life is just too cruel for human race


Don't give a shit anymore
Put down my fist and break down these walls
Don't care anymore about anything in this world
Destruction of my own master race
Don't care anymore about anything in this world
Destruction of my own master race



Get up again
Get ready to fight
Pick up your sword
Fight until we win
Keep on trying
Raise your sword
Get up again
Fight until we win!

Open your eyes, learn how you better understand
This thing called life is just too cruel for human race
Don't give a shit anymore
Put down my fist and break down these walls
Don't care anymore about anything in this world
Destruction of my own master race

It was the best night of my life
When you touched me with love


You told me "Don't be afraid"
You know I will always protect and love you
No matter what comes in our way, we will overcome it
Against all odds


I thought that everything is fine now
Our lives are just flowing so easy

My mother said: "Open your eyes, look around and learn
Don't bow down to pressure!"


Every time when you try to get up after falling down
A lion appears from under a fallen tree
And then he says "Awake! Awake! The time has come"

Righteous anger burns inside me
Anger cannot fix anything, but ... !
Lost illusions, broken dreams crushed
Reality awake me !

Wake up ! Wake up ! Wake up ! Wake up ! Wake up ! Wake up ! Wake up !


All alone, don't break down
Everything's alright ! Everything's alright !

Yeah yeah yeah

Surrender to the wild
Find your way and learn from nature
Dive deep inside yourself and get ready, for the coming storm


Keep on going
Get a little lost in it until you find what you are looking for
You will always have the answers
Trust that there's one for every question you ask the force of nature


Feel like nothing else can heal this pain you feel inside you now
This is the only thing that heals all wounds on earth and everything else in space
Learn from nature



We are but small creatures
Don't forget who you are and where you come from
We cannot see beyond the stars

Feel like nothing else can heal this pain you feel inside you now
This is the only thing that heals all wounds on earth and everything else in space
Learn from nature
Learn from nature
Learn from nature


Lost in it until I found what I was looking for
Incredible force of nature ! 
No matter how long it takes we must dig deeper 'til we find
The reason why we exist

Lost in space, away from this place
Don't you see the stars? Leave your fears behind
You are not alone now, embrace what you feel
Open up your mind and dive deep inside


Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up!
Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up!

Wake up to a new day
New light is coming through
Feel your heart beating fast
Ready for a better future


Wander through forests tall, giant trees
In this land I'm free! My vision is clear
I don't care about time anymore
Open up your mind and dive deep inside...

Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up!
Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up! Wake up!

Wake up to a new day
New light is coming through
Feel your heart beating fast
Ready for a better future

Wake up, I'm awake
I need to rise today
For better things


Lost in my thoughts
Lost in the race against time
Another round of violence

I feel like this for too long
I just can't get enough
This feeling is so strong
Against all reason it comes
Out of the blue you come and strike me down
Now I understand why you do what you do
No matter how many times I try
To overcome my inner child
You win again
Against all reasons
You win again
Against all reasons

I see nothing but walls
Rising up right before me
But they will fall one day
And the dust shall cover all

Awake, I must remain awake
Or else I am crushed beneath the weight
Of my own body collapsing around me
Ashes to ashes we all must return
Carved out from stone, I have survived
The test of time became the rule
Don't close your eyes or your vision fade away
Until you get high on life
